summary: Excellent soundboard remaster with crystal‑clear instrument separation, highlighted by a stellar The Other One → Eyes of the World > China Doll sequence.
review: The three reviews rave about the superb remastering quality – crisp vocals and clean instrument separation that make this SBD recording shine. Musically the show is praised for its powerful jams, especially the transition from The Other One into a space‑filled Eyes of the World that blossoms into an unforgettable China Doll, with the Freight Train segment also noted as a high point.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviewers give 4‑5 stars and highlight both outstanding performance (standout jams) and excellent soundboard quality, indicating a top‑tier show with an exceptional recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Remastered with very clean instrument separation, crisp vocals, no noticeable distortion or dropouts; listeners describe it as “terrific quality” and “clean”.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers especially love the seamless transition from The Other One jam into Eyes of the World, which then flows into a classic China Doll; the Freight Train segment is also highlighted as a high‑energy moment.
